description: This Java class named ExportService provides functionality to generate PDF reports for defects and corrective actions, including formatting details, table construction, and error handling.

classes.name: ExportService
classes.description: A service class responsible for generating PDF exports of defect and corrective action data.

methods.name: exportDefectsPdf
methods.description: Generates a PDF report containing a list of defects and their associated corrective actions, returning the report as a byte array.

methods.name: addHeader
methods.description: Helper method to add formatted header cells to a PDF table.

methods.name: cell
methods.description: Helper method to create table cells with formatted text.
